name: fractal.id
message: THE FULL LEAK OF FRACTAL ID IS HERE ! web.fractal.idWe have extracted over 10GB of DATA from the KYC system of Fractal ID and some of its other systems. The breach includes more than 300,000 users linked to Fractal ID clients in its KYC service. Our leak from the hack includes the following:The total amount of data we managed to access exceeded 10 GB ------ 12GB, including personal photos, bank statements, proof of address, and ETH/BTC addresses.Our breach involves over 300,000 users.ENJOY! "A report will be published soon about the company's status regarding data protection!"
